title: Russian Banana Pancakes
description: A creamy, piquant twist on traditional pancakes, topped with fresh banana slices.
instructions: In a large bowl, mash the ripe bananas with a fork until smooth.
In a separate mixing bowl, combine pancake mix, piquant cream, eggs, and vanilla extract. Mix until just combined.
Add the mashed banana to the dry ingredients and mix until smooth.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and edges start to dry.
Flip and cook for 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
